name: mobile-music-server
description: Personal music streaming server for Android Termux with on-demand Opus compression.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/database.js && node --check src/library.js && node --check src/transcode.js && node --check src/downloader.js && node --check src/lyrics.js && node --check src/recommendations.js && node --check public/app.js
